home_jurisdiction_name.description: Legal name of a foreign entity in its home jurisdiction (for foreign-qualification filings).

maine_assumed_name_for_suffix.description: Alternate name used in Maine when the home-jurisdiction name does not contain a required LLC/Corp/etc. suffix per 31 MRSA §1508.1.

maine_fictitious_name.description: Fictitious name under which a foreign entity seeks authority to conduct activities in Maine when its home-jurisdiction name is unavailable.

formation_date_in_home_jurisdiction.description: Date the foreign entity was originally formed in its home jurisdiction.

home_jurisdiction.description: State or country where the foreign entity was formed.

physical_address.description: Physical-location address of the principal office (single-line: street, city, state, zip, country).

mailing_address.description: Optional mailing address of the principal office if different from physical location.

maine_business_purpose.description: Free-text description of the nature of business or purposes to be conducted/promoted in Maine.

maine_activities_start_date.description: Date the foreign entity commenced or expects to commence conducting activities in Maine.

is_series_llc.description: Boolean indicating the LLC is governed by an agreement establishing designated series with separate rights/powers/duties (per 31 MRSA §1622.2,3).

series_llc_exhibit_letter.description: Exhibit letter referencing additional series-LLC information required when entity.is_series_llc = true.

fict4_accompanies.description: Boolean indicating Form FICT-4 (fictitious name registration) is filed with this application.

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.

name.description: Name of an LLC manager (indexed list — supports up to 3 inline; further on exhibit).

address.description: Combined business/residence/mailing address of an LLC manager (single-line on this form).

additional_attached.description: Boolean opt-in indicating an exhibit listing additional managers is attached.

type.description: Whether the registered agent is a Commercial Registered Agent (CRA) or a Noncommercial Registered Agent. Enum: 'commercial' | 'noncommercial'.
